page: Microsoft Azure NP40s is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the NPS family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, paired with a substantial memory capacity of 672.0 GB. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.8 GB per vCPU, positioning the instance as a memory-optimized resource.

The server is equipped with 3019 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-throughput disk operations. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or integrated GPU hardware.

Given the high density of memory and local storage relative to the 40 dedicated vCPUs, this server offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of GPU accelerators. The hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive analytics, enterprise applications, and caching layers.
description: Microsoft Azure NP40s is an x86_64 memory-optimized server within the NPS family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated vCPUs and a substantial 672.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 16.8 GB of RAM per core. For storage-heavy operations, the instance includes 3019 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not feature integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource allocation makes the NP40s highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, and in-memory data processing where high RAM capacity and dedicated CPU resources are required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NP40s is a memory-optimized server featuring 40 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 672 GB of RAM, and 3019 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NP40s is a memory-optimized server with 40 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 672 GB of RAM, and 3019 GB of local storage.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring dedicated Intel processors, extensive RAM capacity, and high-capacity local storage for demanding enterprise databases.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
672.0 GB of system memory providing 16.8 GB per core
3019 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory analytics
